case_title: PABLO ANTONIO SOBERANIS MEDINA VS. EDUARDO FERRETI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDINA, PABLO ANTONIO SOBERANIS
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-18-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,750.00 FILED BY MEDINA, PABLO ANTONIO SOBERANIS AS TO DEFENDANT FERRETI, EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-18-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PABLO MEDINA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-11-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PABLO MEDINA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE #292302. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-11-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6-14-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/06/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

PROOF OF SERVICE RE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL (SC-150) DATED 01/04/18 MAILED BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT FERRETI RETURNED TO THE COURT UNDELIVERED. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDINA, PABLO ANTONIO SOBERANIS
